ddls:
CREATE TABLE "influencers" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influencer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the influencer */,
  "twitter_name" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the influencer */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the influencer */,
  "user_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of user mentions */,
  "retweet_count" REAL /* Total retweet count */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  "tweets" INTEGER /* Total number of tweets */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes */,
  "friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends */,
  "status_count" INTEGER /* Total number of status updates */,
  "account_age_days" INTEGER /* Age of the account in days */,
  "average_tweets_per_day" REAL /* Average number of tweets per day */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the influencer belongs to */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Calculated engagement rate */,
  "verified_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the account is verified */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the influencer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the influencer */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the influencer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencers_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES influencer_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer who made the tweet */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "tweet_date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was made */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment analysis score of the tweet */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Identified topic of the tweet */,
  "media_count" INTEGER /* Number of media attachments in the tweet */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been quoted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, marketing professional, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for nested categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_category_map" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id", "category_id")
)
column_names: Age of the account in days
Average number of tweets per day
ID of the category the influencer belongs to
Status indicating if the account is verified
ID of the influencer who made the tweet
Sentiment analysis score of the tweet
Number of media attachments in the tweet
Number of times the tweet has been quoted
Role of the user (e.g., analyst, marketing professional, admin)
Date and time of the last login
Date and time when the user account was created
Date and time when the user account was last updated
ID of the parent category (for nested categories)
